parameters.description:
EnableSessionTokenExchangeCode requests the login flow to include a code that can be used to retrieve the session token
after the login flow has been completed.
parameters.name: return_session_token_exchange_code

parameters.description: The URL to return the browser to after the flow was completed.
parameters.name: return_to

parameters.description:
An optional organization ID that should be used to register this user.
This parameter is only effective in the Ory Network.
parameters.name: organization

parameters.description: An optional identity schema to use for the registration flow.
parameters.name: identity_schema
